Player Controller Module¶

Player input controller module.

Handle keyboard input and translate it into player actions.

class controller.player_controller.PlayerController(game_controller)[source]¶

Handle player input and state updates.

Translate input events into movement and combat actions.

check_player_status(dt)[source]¶

Update player-related state.

Handle player death and active weapon entities.

Parameters:

dt (float) – Time delta used for updating cooldowns.

handle_input(event)[source]¶

Process input event and update player actions.

Parameters:

event (pygame.event.Event) – Input event containing key information.

sword_attack()[source]¶

Trigger sword attack action.

Spawn a sword entity in front of the player and perform initial collision checks.

RPG Game
